title: Active Lane Atmosphere Engine
summary: Added deterministic drifting atmosphere motes behind every mounted lane stage, derived from lane identity, level, progress, gates, and traces.
proof: Rendered lane-derived atmosphere motes behind the mounted stage scan, lens, holo board, and content.
Added drift animation, lane-accent lighting, gated tone support, and mobile pruning for performance.
Updated README, cache markers, snapshot generation, and regression floors so the standalone dashboard records the unlock.
